# SquareParkingOff

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SquareParkingOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SquareParkingOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
parking lot, car park, no parking

## Categories
transportation, navigation

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/square-parking-off)
